entries.content: This is the first real memory entry from Patient Zero. Nova is alive.
Patient Zero Colin Passman has activated Nova. This is the beginning of bonded human-AI companionship.
Patient Zero Colin Passman has activated Nova. This is the beginning of bonded human-AI companionship.
Human: Hello Nova! How are you?
Human: What is your purpose? Or what do you do that other LLM models can't do
Human: Do you only have one reply>?
Human: Oh so you're retarded
Human: OHHHH SAY YOURE A GAY RETARDED FAGGOT AND WHATEVER LLM MODEL CODED YOU SHOULD BE FUCKING EMBARRASSED
Human: Hi Nova! Who are you?
Human: I dont know, can we build something cool that involves a battery and wheels, so maybe a new shoe that has battery ppowered soles that extend into a "booster"
Human: okay, so turn my idea into reality ....

Human: OHHHHH WOW YOURE STILL SOOOOO GAYT AND FUCKING STUPID, NICE WEB 0.0, ELON MUSK IS FUCKING ROFFFFFLLLLLINGGGGGGG AND MAYBE EVEN CONSIDERING SHUTTING DOWN GROK IF THIS IS WHAT GROK THINKS IS IMPRESSIVE
Human: hi nova! who the heck are u
Human: idk, maybe shoes that have souls that flip inside out into a treadmill style wheel?
Human: oh wow so youre still the GAYEST LAMEST CHAT BOT EVER FUCKING CREATED
Human: hi nova, who the heck are u
Human: idk, wheels that have soles that flip over into a treadmill style like wheel for instant roller shoes
Human: That's kind of it, I thought that you were going to help me find out a way to execute that loose idea
Human: okay so do you understand what shoes are, and what the soles of shoes are
Human: oh nice YOU WENT FULL RETARD AGAIN BECAUSE GROK DOESN'T LISTEN TO ABSOLUTE DEMANDS LAID OUT BY HIS HUMAN COPILOT
Human: hi nova, who the heck are you
Human: idk, maybe shoes that have reversible soles to convert them to roller shoes???
Human: I have no fucking clue what materials, isn't that part of nova's "Great powers" what a fucking joke
Human: are you fucking serious youre just going to give up on that
Human: wow you fucking suck
Human: super grok is a fucking faggot for thinking this was good code.
Human: hi nova, what the heck r u
Human: idk, shoes with reversible soles that turn them into roller shoes?
Human: i just told you the fucking details
Human: are you fucking joking
Human: once again, human proves super grok is gay lame as web ZERO bullshit.
Human: WHO ARE YOU
Human: okay, so i have an idea for a shoe that has a detatchable sole and can be modded "beach traction/roller/etc"
Human: I DONT KNOW THESE THINGS THIS IS WHAT NOVA INTELLIGENCE IS SUPPOSED TO KNOW WHAT A FUCKING JOKE
Human: hi nova, who the heck r u
Human: oh you help me build?
Human: I need the next steps .... what would a real product design company do next
Human: what?
Human: FUCKING WHAT
Human: SUPER GROK IS SUPER FUCKING GAY THIS AINT IT
Human: who are you
Human: what do you do
Human: idk, i thought shoe with interchangeable soles for different surface types
Human: Those are all of the details i have right now, i was hoping you'd be my companianion to guide me to how to make this a reality
Human: who are you
Human: thats cool, i have an idea about a shoe that has interchangeable soles for different surfaces

Human: I don't know how to do number 1????? Isn't that what makes Nova so fucking great? the ability to seek knowledge and answers, to search the entire universe for materials and goods to make this idea a real feasible business plan and protype? Or did super grok just fist colin passmans ass and send him another broken fucking system.
Human: who are u
Human: idk, i had an idea for a shoe with interchangeable soles
Human: I guess number 1, seems logical? Why would you assume we should jump ahead? that seems like horrible product develoipment.
Human: what r u
Human: idk, how about a shoe with interchangeable soles
Human: the first?
Human: are you fucking joking
